text:
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert about a permanent failure with 429 rate limit error in the Daily Pipeline workflow.
- [escalation] Andy: Family message from brother Andrew Lang about a significant upcoming family change with reminder about gentleness.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Weekly Audit Health Report workflow has failed.
- [escalation] Andy: Daily correspondence summary highlighting an escalation from Andrew Lang that requires Mister Lang's attention.
- [decision required] Tavily: Failed payment of $27.10 to Tavily due to credit card issue.
- [decision required] Tavily: Tavily pay-as-you-go charge failed, possibly due to expired card or insufficient funds.
- [decision required] ant.wilson@supabase.com: Supabase project 'mmmichaelllang's Project' will be paused due to inactivity over 7 days.
- [scheduling] Alan Beasley: Alan Beasley sending Zoom link for Saturday morning meeting at 10am.
- [scheduling] Don Cooper: Don Cooper wants to schedule another meeting to discuss hardware resources and project ideas.
- [no action] "Superhuman – Zain Kahn": Superhuman newsletter about a startup emerging from stealth and Excel data analysis tips.
